examples: I'm so sorry I missed the housewarming.
Will you go to Lisa's housewarming party next Sunday?
There are usually no planned activities like games at a housewarming party.
His dream: to invite his 60-odd new supporters to a housewarming party in his new place.
In the most magnanimous of housewarming gifts, the billionaire internet mogul is welcoming incoming New York Times Co.
